<!-- title: Editor Functions -->
<!-- pageid: 1507 -->
<!-- revid: 8353 -->
<!-- timestamp: 2022-12-12T05:37:35Z -->
<!-- source: https://wohlsoft.ru/pgewiki/Editor_Functions -->

Functions that work only in edit mode are used through Script Editor (Editor).

==ObjectCreate==
Returns the PermID of Object. 
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!Parameters
!Description
|-
| rowspan="3" |Type
| rowspan="3" |The Type of Object
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!Type
!Name
|-
|1
|Blocks
|-
|2
|Backgrounds
|-
|3
|NPCs
|-
|4
|Liquids
|}
|-
|-
|}
 dim PermID as integer = objectcreate(Type)

==ObjectRemove==
Remove the object get called.

{| class="wikitable"
|+
!Parameters
!Description
|-
|Type
|The Type of Object
{| class="wikitable"
!ID
!Name
|-
|1
|Blocks
|-
|2
|Backgrounds
|-
|3
|NPCs
|-
|4
|Warps
|-
|5
|Liquids
|}
|-
| rowspan="3" |PermID
| rowspan="3" |PermID of Object
|-
|
|-
|}
 call objectremove(Type, PermID)
'''<big>Additional Information</big>'''
*All objects and (most of) properties can be manipulated within the Script Editor (Editor), through their PermID.
[[Category:TeaScript.vbs]]
